candidate_definition_hints.text: Precise RoI Pooling with coordinate gradient support, proposed in the paper "Acquisition of Localization Confidence for Accurate Object Detection" (https://arxiv.org/abs/1807.11590).

This repo implements the **Precise RoI Pooling** (PrRoI Pooling), proposed in the paper **Acquisition of Localization Confidence for Accurate Object Detection** published at ECCV 2018 (Oral Presentation).
